weighting_note: cap = market-cap weighted with per-name cap + redistribution; equal = 1/N. Weights are the canonical pre-fill; on-chain unitQty is derived at create time from live prices.

funds.name: Magnificent 7
funds.description: The seven mega-cap US tech leaders driving market returns.

vault.rationale: Static cap-weighted basket: weights drift naturally like a cap-weighted index, so no rebalance is needed (UIT). Recipe held on-chain.
vault.cash_entry: Wrap with ForwardCashQueue (L5) for forward-priced cash create/redeem; in-kind create/redeem works without it.

funds.name: Equal-Weight Tech 20
funds.description: Top 20 technology names held at equal weight (rebalanced to 1/N).

vault.rationale: Equal-weight must be held to 1/N, so it needs periodic reweight (RSP-like); the rebalance vault restores the target via an AP auction.
vault.cash_entry: Wrap with ForwardCashQueue (L5) for forward-priced cash create/redeem; in-kind create/redeem works without it.
